$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Deferred decisions and blockers for Stage 1 and Stage 2 boundary control.

items.description: Stage 1 FFET execution may not begin until human Gate 3 approval names the approved scope.
Backend routes, controllers, Foundry activation, Gatekeeper routing, audit/evidence emission, tenant isolation proof, and frontend bundle pruning remain Stage 2.
The Stage 0 semantic contract/package namespace rename remains deferred to a Stage 2 versioned contract-change pack.
Counsel/external review and three-AI review remain outside Stage 1 execution and do not authorize public activation.
